ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator' && $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps' && $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended' && $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User' && $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User No DF' && $Profile.Name <> 'Infer API' && NOT (ISNEW ()) && ( ISPICKVAL(Business_Unit__c ,'Strategic') && ISBLANK( TEXT( Strategic_Region__c ) ) ) || ( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Business_Unit__c ,'Strategic')) && NOT (ISBLANK( TEXT(Strategic_Region__c))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If the Business Unit is Strategic, then Strategic Region must be populated, and Strategic Region values should only be added to Strategic Accounts.
